final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            out <= 4'b0000; // Reset output to 0
        end else begin
            out <= out + 1; // Increment output
        end
    end
endmodule
